visual: Balances on one leg and swings the other leg in a wide outward crescent arc, hands slapping the foot as it crosses the body.
motion_description: The motion begins with a weight shift entirely onto the left leg to support a continuous 180-degree pivot to the right. As the torso rotates, the right leg sweeps upward in a wide, outward crescent arc across the front of the body. Both hands ascend to chest height to slap the sweeping foot in rapid succession, after which the right leg steps out into a wide, low stance while the hands smoothly press downward.
